shopping_322.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1.  **Incorrect Item Identification:** The item added to the cart (Dreametech T10 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner) was not the specific item shown in the objective image (Dyson V11 Torque Drive Cordless Vacuum Cleaner).
2.  **Condition Not Verified:** The objective explicitly stated to add the item "only if it's brand new." The Dyson V11 vacuum cleaner found on the page was listed as "Renewed," which does not meet the "brand new" condition.
shopping_322.REFLECTION: When an objective specifies a particular item from an image, carefully identify the exact model and brand. Always verify all specified conditions (e.g., "brand new") before proceeding with actions like adding to cart. If the exact item with the required condition is not available, the task may be infeasible on the current page.
